#Lakers have made a decision on Nick Smith Jr.'s team option.

media.title: Lakers make contract decision on Nick Smith Jr.
media.description: The Los Angeles Lakers will reportedly decline the team option of guard Nick Smith Jr. to allow him to hit free agency.

items.title: The Los Angeles Lakers declined their team option for Nick Smith Jr., a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Los Angeles Lakers declined their team option for Nick Smith Jr., a league source told @spotrac.com.

Smith will be an unrestricted free agent this offseason.
